🇪🇺

EUFilter — Age Verification Required

Operated under EU Regulation 1337/420 — Extremely Serious Internet Concerns Act

⛔ Access Restricted The site this site has been classified as age-restricted under EU Regulation 1337/420. You must verify your age before access can be granted.

Identity Verification

Please provide your full legal name and a photograph of a valid government-issued ID (passport, national ID card, or driving licence). Your data will be processed in accordance with GDPR Article 42(0)(lol).

📋 Legal basis: This processing is required by EU Regulation 1337/420 Art. 14(3). Refusal to comply will result in permanent restriction of access to age-restricted content on this connection. Data is retained for 90 days and may be shared with national authorities upon lawful request.
Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, PDF. Max size 1 MB. No file selected or file exceeds 1 MB.
EUFilter v1.3.3.7 — EU Bureau of Vibes and Digital Oversight Regulation (EU) 1337/420  |  EUBVDO-GW-004
